meta.title: removerMark — Remove NotebookLM Watermarks
meta.description: Free online tool to remove NotebookLM watermarks from infographics, slide decks, and PDFs. 100% client-side, no uploads.

hero.kicker: A free NotebookLM watermark remover for PDFs, infographics, and slide decks.

preview.method.crop.desc: Fills the watermark area with the matching background color. Clean and predictable.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: removerMark supports PDF files (slide decks), PNG images (infographics), and JPG/JPEG images from NotebookLM.
faq.q2: Are my files uploaded to a server?
faq.a2: No. All processing happens entirely in your browser using JavaScript. Your files never leave your device. You can verify this by checking the Network tab in your browser's developer tools.
faq.a3: Yes, completely free with no limits. removerMark is open source software.
faq.q4: How does the watermark removal work?
faq.a4: removerMark detects the NotebookLM watermark (typically bottom-right) and reconstructs the pixels underneath to hide it.
faq.a5: It only adjusts a small area near the watermark while keeping the rest of your content intact.
faq.a6: Yes. removerMark is fully responsive and works on smartphones and tablets.
faq.a7: No. removerMark is an independent open source project and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or associated with Google LLC or NotebookLM in any way.
faq.q8: Can I use it for non-NotebookLM files?
faq.a8: The tool is optimized for NotebookLM exports. It may also work on other files with a similar bottom-right badge position, but results can vary depending on the image background.
faq.q9: How do I remove a NotebookLM watermark from a PDF?
faq.a9: Upload your PDF directly to removerMark. The tool automatically detects each page, locates the NotebookLM watermark badge at the bottom-right corner, removes it, and lets you download a clean PDF — all inside your browser with no uploads.
faq.q10: Does removerMark work with NotebookLM infographics?
faq.a10: Yes. NotebookLM infographics are exported as PNG images. removerMark detects the watermark position automatically and reconstructs the background pixels. Simply upload the PNG and download the clean version.
faq.q11: Is there a file size limit?
faq.a11: The maximum file size is 50MB per file. For multi-page PDFs, each page is processed individually so large documents are handled efficiently.
faq.q12: Can I process multiple files at once?
faq.a12: Yes. removerMark supports batch processing — upload multiple files at once and download them all as a ZIP archive.
faq.q13: Why does the watermark removal look different on some images?
faq.a13: Results depend on the background behind the watermark badge. Solid or gradient backgrounds produce near-perfect results. Complex backgrounds with illustrations or textures near the badge may show slight differences.
faq.q14: What is the NotebookLM watermark and why does it appear?
faq.a14: NotebookLM automatically adds a small 'NotebookLM' badge to all exported infographics, slide decks, and PDFs. It appears at the bottom-right corner of every page or image.
faq.q15: Does it work on NotebookLM slide decks?
faq.a15: Yes. NotebookLM slide decks are exported as PDFs. Upload the PDF to removerMark and each slide will have the watermark removed automatically.
faq.a16: removerMark works on all modern browsers: Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge — on both desktop and mobile.
howItWorks.title: How to Remove a NotebookLM Watermark
howItWorks.intro: Removing the NotebookLM watermark with removerMark takes less than a minute. Follow the steps below to clean infographics, slide decks, and PDF exports directly in your browser.
howItWorks.steps.title: Step-by-step process
howItWorks.steps.1: Export your file from NotebookLM (infographic, slide deck, or PDF).
howItWorks.steps.2: Go to removerMark.com and upload the file (drag and drop or click to browse).
howItWorks.steps.3: Preview the result using the before/after slider.
howItWorks.steps.4: Download the clean file — PDF, PNG, or JPG.
howItWorks.methods.title: Removal methods
howItWorks.methods.smartFill.title: Smart Fill
howItWorks.methods.smartFill.desc: Smart Fill reconstructs pixels around the watermark area to blend naturally with the surrounding background. It is the best option for clean solid colors and gradients.
howItWorks.methods.crop.title: Crop
howItWorks.methods.crop.desc: Crop trims a minimal region where the badge appears. This method is predictable and fully reliable when you want guaranteed visual consistency.
howItWorks.why.title: Why remove the NotebookLM watermark?
howItWorks.why.p1: Clean exports look more professional when you publish internal documentation, presentations, or social visuals. Removing the badge also helps maintain consistent branding across your materials.
howItWorks.why.p2: removerMark keeps the process private and fast, because everything is done in your browser without uploads.
howItWorks.schema.name: How to Remove a NotebookLM Watermark
howItWorks.schema.description: Step-by-step guide to remove the NotebookLM watermark from infographics, slide decks, and PDFs using removerMark.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro.title: Introduction
privacy.intro.text: Welcome to removerMark. We are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how our tool handles your data.
privacy.local.title: Local Processing
privacy.local.text: removerMark operates as a 100% client-side tool. All file processing happens locally within your web browser. Your files are NEVER uploaded to our servers or any third-party servers. Your data stays on your device at all times.
privacy.collect.title: Information We Collect
privacy.collect.text: We do not collect, store, or process any personal data or file content. We may use anonymous analytics (page visits) to improve the tool. No file data is ever transmitted.
privacy.cookies.title: Cookies & Local Storage
privacy.cookies.text: We use browser local storage to save your preferences (theme and language). We do not use tracking cookies.
privacy.contact.title: Contact
privacy.contact.text: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us through our Contact page.
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
terms.acceptance.text: By using removerMark, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use this tool.
terms.service.title: Description of Service
terms.service.text: removerMark is a free, open source, client-side tool that removes visible watermarks from NotebookLM-generated content. All processing occurs in your browser.
terms.responsibility.title: User Responsibility
terms.responsibility.text: You are solely responsible for ensuring that your use of this tool complies with applicable laws and the terms of service of the platforms that generated your content. removerMark does not encourage or endorse the violation of any third-party terms of service.
terms.disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
terms.disclaimer.text: removerMark is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not affiliated with Google LLC or NotebookLM. We are not responsible for any consequences arising from your use of this tool.
terms.ip.title: Intellectual Property
terms.ip.text: The content you process through removerMark remains yours. We do not claim any rights to your files or the output generated.
terms.changes.title: Changes to Terms
terms.changes.text: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the tool after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have questions, feedback, or issues? We'd love to hear from you.
